experience_chunks.description: Implemented streaming data pipelines on Kafka and Spark Streaming for a real-time user-activity processing platform at Hooli.

Full-stack web application development at a SaaS company. Built React-based admin interfaces and Node.js REST APIs.
Java backend development at large enterprises. Worked on customer onboarding flows and transaction handling.
